ksa_text: Ability to design meaningful performance metrics and measurement instruments that characterize data usability, analytical output quality, and progress toward business objectives, selecting measures that capture the right dimensions of effectiveness.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.0) to justify inclusion for the Data and AI Transformation Lead. Without stronger framework alignment, this ability KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain ability KSA be expected in real-world Data and AI Transformation Lead roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Applied Analytics & BI is not a standard competency expectation for Data and AI Transformation Lead. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Data and AI Transformation Lead competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (Applied Analytics & BI) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Data and AI Transformation Lead. All passes support exclusion.
